name: CircleToSVG
description: Converts Grasshopper Circle geometries to SVG <circle> element strings. Transforms center from Rhino Y-up to SVG Y-down using the canvas anchor.

inputParameters.name: circle
inputParameters.description: Circle geometry or list of circles

inputParameters.name: strokeColor
inputParameters.description: Stroke color or list of stroke colors. Default: none

inputParameters.name: strokeWidth
inputParameters.description: Stroke width or list of stroke widths. Default: 0

inputParameters.name: fillColor
inputParameters.description: Fill color or list of fill colors. Default: none

inputParameters.name: canvas
inputParameters.description: Canvas rectangle for Y-axis flipping. Default: (0,0,100,100)

outputParameters.name: svgCode
outputParameters.description: SVG element string(s); chain into CRC_SaveSVG for file export.
